Our Story

About Sneha Enterprises

A trusted name in India's agri-export sector — connecting Indian farms to global markets with quality, integrity and transparency since Bihar's heartland.

Meet the Team Get a Quote
Established · Madhepura, Bihar, India

Who We Are

Sneha Enterprises is an India-based agri-export and import company headquartered in Madhepura, Bihar — the heartland of India's finest agricultural produce. We specialise in sourcing, processing and exporting premium commodities including grains, spices, fox nuts (makhana) and fresh vegetables to buyers across the globe.

With 2+ years of focused export experience and deep roots in Bihar's farming communities, we have built a trusted supply chain — connecting verified Indian farmers directly to international buyers across the Middle East, Southeast Asia, Africa and Europe.

We are a registered exporter from India — holding IEC Code, GST Registration, FSSAI License and APEDA certification. Every shipment is fully documented, lab-tested and compliant with international import standards.

Our Direction

Vision & Mission

🔭

दृष्टि

VISION

भारत के कृषि उत्पाद को वैश्विक बाजार में एक विश्वसनीय ब्रांड के रूप में स्थापित करना।

To establish India's agricultural products as a trusted brand in the global market — recognised for quality, reliability and ethical sourcing.

🎯

उद्देश्य

MISSION
🌾

किसानों से सीधे संबंध स्थापित करके उच्च गुणवत्ता वाली उपज की निरंतर आपूर्ति सुनिश्चित करना।

Ensure continuous supply of high-quality produce by building direct relationships with farmers.

💰

प्रतिस्पर्धी मूल्य और समय पर डिलीवरी सुनिश्चित करना।

Ensure competitive pricing and timely delivery for every order.

📋

अंतर्राष्ट्रीय निर्यात मानकों का पालन करना।

Adhere to all international export standards, certifications and compliance requirements.

🤝

ग्राहकों के साथ दीर्घकालिक व्यापारिक संबंध बनाए रखना।

Build and maintain long-term business relationships with our global customers.

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

🌾

Quality First

Every product is lab-tested, graded and certified before shipment. No compromise — ever.

🤝

Trust & Transparency

Honest pricing, real specs, full documentation. We say what we do and do what we say.

⏱️

On-Time Delivery

We respect your production schedules. Shipments dispatched as committed — always.

🌱

Farmer Welfare

Fair pricing for our farmers means a sustainable supply of premium produce, season after season.

Credentials

Certifications & Documents

Sneha Enterprises is a fully registered exporter from India. All documents available on request.

🌐

IEC Code

Import Export Code issued by DGFT — mandatory registration for all Indian exporters under the Foreign Trade Policy.

✓ Active Registration
🧾

GST Registration

GST registered business. All exports are zero-rated (0% GST) with full compliance and refund documentation.

✓ GST Compliant
🥗

FSSAI License

Food Safety & Standards Authority of India license — certifying our food products meet all Indian food safety norms.

✓ Food Safe
🌿

Phytosanitary Certificate

Issued by NPPO India (Plant Quarantine) for each shipment — confirms produce is pest-free and safe for import.

✓ Per Shipment
📋

APEDA Registration

Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority — our exports are APEDA registered and certified.

✓ APEDA Certified
📜

Certificate of Origin

Issued by Chamber of Commerce / FIEO for each shipment — officially confirming Indian origin of all products exported.

✓ Available Per Shipment
🛡️
View & Verify Our Certificates
View watermarked previews of all certificates and verify on official government portals. Full copies available on request.
View All Certificates →
